positive: A charming, kawaii-style mascot illustration of a sleepy badger wearing a tiny chef's apron and holding a steaming cup of coffee. Flat design, bold outlines, simple shapes, bright pastel color palette (mustard yellow, pale blue, cream). Sticker art, adorable, cheerful, vector style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, complex shading, grunge, messy
